title: Weekly Operations Sync — Feb 18
content:
# Weekly Operations Sync — Feb 18, 2026

**Attendees:** Sarah Chen, Mike Rodriguez, Priya Patel, James Wilson, AI Agent

## Key Updates

### Sales (Mike)
- Strong week: $12,450 in revenue (60% wholesale, 40% retail)
- Grand Hotel proposal still pending — following up Friday
- Valentine's gift bundles exceeded expectations: 24 sold

### Operations (Sarah)
- Q1 pricing review 60% complete
- Mediterranean Imports onboarding in progress — waiting on their catalog
- Need to schedule quarterly inventory audit

### Logistics (James)
- Negotiated 15% FedEx discount ✅
- Prosciutto di Parma out of stock — sourcing from backup supplier
- Warehouse reorganization planned for March

### Finance (Priya)
- January reconciliation in progress
- Q1 marketing budget ready for review
- Cash flow healthy — $84K in operating account

## Action Items
- [ ] Mike: Follow up with Grand Hotel by Friday
- [ ] James: Source Prosciutto from backup supplier
- [ ] Sarah: Complete Q1 pricing by Feb 22
- [ ] AI Agent: Generate weekly sales report by EOD Monday
- [ ] Priya: Share Q1 budget breakdown with Sarah

title: Q1 Planning Review
content:
# Q1 Planning Review

**Attendees:** Sarah Chen, Mike Rodriguez, Priya Patel

## Revenue Targets
- Q1 Target: $150,000 (up 18% from Q4)
- January Actual: $42,800 ✅ on track
- February Projection: $48,200

## Key Initiatives
1. **Wholesale Expansion** — Target 5 new restaurant accounts
2. **Website Refresh** — Update product photography and descriptions
3. **Loyalty Program** — Launch by end of March
4. **New Supplier** — Onboard Mediterranean Imports for specialty items

## Budget Allocation
| Category | Budget |
|----------|--------|
| Marketing | $8,000 |
| Trade Show (FoodExpo) | $3,500 |
| Website | $2,000 |
| Samples | $1,500 |

## Decisions
- ✅ Approved trade show booth at FoodExpo March 15
- ✅ Moving forward with loyalty program (points-based)
- ⏳ Website redesign deferred to Q2

title: New Supplier Onboarding — Mediterranean Imports
content:
# New Supplier Onboarding — Mediterranean Imports

**Attendees:** Sarah Chen, James Wilson
**Supplier Contact:** Marco Bellini (marco@medimports.com)

## Overview
Mediterranean Imports specializes in Italian and Greek specialty foods. Based in Brooklyn, NY.

## Products of Interest
- Premium olive oils (Sicilian, Cretan)
- Aged balsamic varieties
- Artisan pasta (bronze-die extruded)
- Specialty preserves

## Terms Discussed
- Net 30 payment terms
- Minimum order: $500
- Free shipping on orders over $2,000
- 5% discount on orders over $5,000

## Next Steps
- [ ] Waiting on their full product catalog
- [ ] Request samples of top 10 items
- [ ] Set up vendor in Cin7
- [ ] Trial order planned for March

title: Monthly Sales Review — January
content:
# Monthly Sales Review — January 2026

**Attendees:** Full Team

## Performance Summary
- **Total Revenue:** $42,800 (+12% MoM)

- **Wholesale:** $28,600 (67%)

## Top Products

2. Parmigiano Reggiano 1kg — 62 units
3. Organic Honey 1kg — 58 units
4. Saffron Threads 5g — 45 units
5. Aged Balsamic 500ml — 41 units

## Top Wholesale Accounts
1. The Grand Hotel — $4,200
2. Fresh & Fine Provisions — $3,800
3. Oak & Ember Restaurant — $3,100

## Challenges

title: Inventory Strategy Meeting
content:
# Inventory Strategy Meeting

**Attendees:** Sarah Chen, James Wilson, AI Agent

## Current State
- 50 active SKUs
- 3 items out of stock
- 7 items at low stock levels
- Average inventory turnover: 4.2x/year

## Reorder Strategy
- **Fast movers** (Truffle Oil, Honey, Balsamic): Maintain 60-day supply
- **Specialty items** (Saffron, Yuzu): 90-day supply due to lead times
- **Seasonal** (Gift bundles): Order 30 days before peak

## AI Agent Automation
- ✅ Daily inventory sync from POS
- ✅ Weekly low-stock report
- 🔜 Automated reorder suggestions based on velocity
- 🔜 Supplier price comparison alerts

## Decisions
- Set minimum stock alerts at 10 units for fast movers
- James to negotiate consignment terms with top 3 suppliers
- AI Agent to build demand forecasting model

title: Website Performance Review
content:
# Website Performance Review

**Attendees:** Mike Rodriguez, AI Agent

## Traffic Stats (January)
- Unique visitors: 3,420
- Page views: 12,800
- Bounce rate: 42%
- Avg session duration: 2m 45s

## Conversion
- Add to cart rate: 8.2%
- Checkout conversion: 2.1% (down from 2.8%)
- Cart abandonment: 68%

## Issues Identified
- Slow load time on mobile (4.2s)
- Missing product photos for 8 items
- Checkout flow too many steps

## Action Plan
1. Optimize images (target < 2s load)
2. Schedule product photo shoot
3. Simplify checkout to 2 steps
4. Add trust badges and reviews

title: Wholesale Account Strategy
content:
# Wholesale Account Strategy

**Attendees:** Mike Rodriguez, Sarah Chen

## Current Accounts: 12 active

## Target New Accounts for Q1
1. **Seaside Resort & Spa** — Initial meeting scheduled Feb 5
2. **Downtown Food Hall** — Mike has a contact
3. **Green Valley Organics** — They reached out via website
4. **The Chef's Table** — Referred by Grand Hotel
5. **Campus Dining Services** — Large volume potential

## Pricing Strategy
- Tier 1 (>$2K/month): 25% off retail
- Tier 2 ($1-2K/month): 20% off retail
- Tier 3 (<$1K/month): 15% off retail
- Sample policy: First order includes free sample pack

## Proposal Template
- AI Agent to create standardized proposal template
- Include: catalog, pricing tier, delivery schedule, payment terms

title: Product Tasting — New Suppliers
content:
# Product Tasting — New Suppliers

**Attendees:** Mike Rodriguez, Sarah Chen, James Wilson

## Samples Reviewed

### Mediterranean Imports
| Product | Rating | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Sicilian EVOO | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Exceptional. Peppery finish. Must carry. |
| Calabrian Chili Paste | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Good heat, great flavor. Niche appeal. |
| Bronze-die Penne | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Good texture. Competitive price. |
| Lemon Marmalade | ⭐⭐⭐ | Decent but we have better options. |

### Nordic Harvest
| Product | Rating | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Lingonberry Preserve | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Unique. Would pair well with cheese boards. |
| Smoked Sea Salt | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Incredible. Better than our current. |
| Rye Crispbread | ⭐⭐⭐ | Good but low margin. Pass. |

## Decisions
- ✅ Order EVOO and Chili Paste from Mediterranean Imports
- ✅ Order Smoked Sea Salt from Nordic Harvest
- ❌ Pass on Rye Crispbread and Lemon Marmalade
